member.name: T:Prime.Base.Utilities.Base32
member.summary: Helper class to convert ToFrom base32. https://gist.github.com/erdomke/9335c394c5cc65404c4cf9aceab04143.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.Base32.FromBase32String(System.String)
member.summary: Converts from base32 string to byte array.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.Base32.ToBase32String(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert byte data to base32.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.Utilities.DataTableUtilities
member.summary: Represents string manipulation utilities.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.DataTableUtilities.BuildConsoleTable(System.Data.DataTable,System.String)
member.summary: Build console table.
member.returns: Ordered text to represent in console the table.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.DataTableUtilities.AddHorizontalSeparatorForConsolePrint(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Add Empty row that will be changed in ConsolePrint as horizontal separator between rows.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.Utilities.LongUtilities
member.summary: Contains a set of utilities for long types.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.LongUtilities.ToEngineeringNotation(System.Int64)
member.summary: Converts the given long into engineering notation.
member.returns: The given number converted to engineering notation.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.Utilities.Memory
member.summary: Memory utility class.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.Memory.GetCurrentProcessMemory
member.summary: Gets the current process memory.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities
member.summary: Represents string manipulation utilities.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.StringWithUnitsToDouble(System.String)
member.summary: Converts string representing number with units to double value.
member.exception: thrown if the conversion is failed.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.DeflateCompress(System.String)
member.summary: Applies deflate algorithm on the provided string.
member.param: string to apply the deflate algorithm on.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.DeflateCompress32(System.String)
member.summary: Applies deflate algorithm on the provided string. Returns base32 string.
member.param: string to apply the deflate algorithm on.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.DeflateDecompress(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Applied decompress deflate algorithm.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.DeflateDecompress32(System.String)
member.summary: Applied decompress deflate algorithm on a string (base32).

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.ConvertBinaryToHex(System.String)
member.summary: Convert incoming binary string to hex string.
member.param: binary string to be convert to hex string.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.ConvertNumberedStringToRLE(System.String)
member.summary: Applies RLE algorithm on the string that contain 0-9.
member.param: string contain 0-9 to apply the RLE algorithm on.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.Reverse(System.String)
member.summary: Reverse the incoming string.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.StringUtilities.MapNumberToRLEAlphabet(System.Char)
member.summary: Map the Numbered Character (0-9 to A-J) or Alphabet Character (s to K) and return the RLE Alphabet.
member.param: Case sensitive character that is 0 to 9 or s.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.Utilities.XmlDeserializer`1
member.summary: This is an utility class to help the developer on the deserialization of XML files.
member.typeparam: The root class of the XML file generated by the xsd.exe tool included in VS.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.Utilities.XmlDeserializer`1.Deserialize(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the root object of type T with the content of the XML file.
member.param: The local path to the XML file.
The local path to the XSD file to check the XML file.
The schema namespace defined on the XSD file.
member.returns: The root object from the XML.
